# truenas_cronjob (Data Source)

Provides information about a cron job on TrueNAS SCALE.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "truenas_cronjob" "example" {
  id = 1
}

output "cronjob_command" {
  value = data.truenas_cronjob.example.command
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (Number) The numeric cron job ID to look up.

### Read-Only

- `command` (String) Command to run.
- `description` (String) Free-form description.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the job is enabled.
- `schedule_dom` (String) Cron day-of-month field.
- `schedule_dow` (String) Cron day-of-week field.
- `schedule_hour` (String) Cron hour field.
- `schedule_minute` (String) Cron minute field.
- `schedule_month` (String) Cron month field.
- `stderr` (Boolean) Whether stderr is captured.
- `stdout` (Boolean) Whether stdout is captured.
- `user` (String) User the job runs as.
